data.title: Broffy is the first AI Pet Chat App launched in New York on Jan. 12, 2026, offering personalized companion experience.
data.description: Introducing Broffy, a cutting-edge application merging artificial intelligence with pet care to provide users with a uniquely tailored companion experience. Recently launched in New York on January 12, 2026, this innovative app, known as Broffy, revolutionizes the concept of pet ownership by infusing emotional connection into the interaction. It stands as the pioneering AI Pet Chat App, showcasing the boundless possibilities when technology meets companionship.

data.title: Metallium sets up Level 1 ADR program with Bank of New York for trading on OTCQX with ticker MTLMY.
data.description: Metallium (ASX: MTM; OTCQX: MTMCF and MTLMY) revealed the launch of a Level 1 sponsored American Depository Receipts (ADR) program with the Bank of New York. The ADRs will trade on the OTCQX platform under the symbol MTLMY starting today.

data.title: World Liberty Financial launches $3.4B stablecoin for crypto lending amid rising demand for onchain credit.
data.description: A new crypto lending platform has been introduced by World Liberty Financial, centered on its stablecoin valued at USD1. The platform comes as there are indications of a resurgence in demand for credit transactions on the blockchain network.

data.title: ANUA teases KPop Demon Hunters collaboration for 2026, riding on Netflix's success. Launching a story-driven campaign.
data.description: ANUA has hinted at a major upcoming event in the world of KPop Demon Hunters by releasing the first teaser for its 2026 global collaboration. With Netflix's KPop Demon Hunters gaining immense popularity among fans globally, ANUA is set to become a part of this expanding universe. The story-driven campaign is expected to generate massive excitement among fans and further solidify the franchise's position in pop culture.

data.title: KOIL Energy wins major contract to supply subsea distribution system for Gulf of America project.
data.description: In Houston on January 12, 2026, KOIL Energy Solutions, Inc. (OTCQB: KLNG), a leading global provider of subsea equipment and services, revealed securing a notable contract. The agreement entails delivering a subsea distribution system for a major deepwater venture in the Gulf of America.

data.title: Cheryl Baldwin of Pure Strategies wins Women in Sustainability Leadership Award in 2026 for her contributions to sustainability.
data.description: Cheryl Baldwin from Pure Strategies in Gloucester, Massachusetts, was recently honored for her leadership and contributions to the future generations of women in sustainability. The award was given on January 12, 2026. Cheryl Baldwin holds the position of Vice President of Sustainability Consulting at Pure Strategies.

data.title: AdventHealth breaks ground on new ER in Auburndale area, bringing emergency care closer to families.
data.description: In Auburndale, Florida on January 12, 2026, AdventHealth marked the beginning of construction for a new facility that will provide quicker access to critical medical services for residents in the area. The event was attended by local officials, community figures, and the organization's representatives.

data.title: HyOrc completes OTCQB uplist application for green methanol commercialization. (chars: 74)
data.description: Today, in Houston on January 12, 2026, HyOrc Corporation (OTCID: HYOR), a company specializing in clean-energy infrastructure with a focus on green methanol and rail decarbonisation, has disclosed that they successfully finalized and submitted all necessary paperwork for their transition to the OTCQB market.

data.title: $1.2B strategy invested in Bitcoin, largest purchase since July due to MSCI's decision not to exclude it from indices.
data.description: In its biggest acquisition of Bitcoin in five months, Strategy made a significant purchase after MSCI decided against excluding the company from its indices.

data.title: Global synthetic biology & biomanufacturing market grows with regulatory mandates and corporate sustainability, expected to boom 2026-2036 - ResearchAndMarkets.
data.description: A recent report titled "The Global Synthetic Biology & Biomanufacturing Market 2026-2036" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for synthetic biology and biomanufacturing is considered highly transformative in the modern bioeconomy, as it merges advanced biotechnology, computational biology, and sustainable manufacturing. This market involves applying engineering principles to biology for designing and controlling biological systems. With an increasing focus on innovative solutions, the market is expected to witness significant growth within the forecast period.

data.title: Iowans concerned about rising healthcare costs, believe lawmakers not addressing issue; 61% surveyed agree.
data.description: In Des Moines, Iowa, a recent statewide poll conducted by Iowans for Affordable Healthcare revealed noteworthy bipartisan worry about escalating healthcare expenses. The survey found that approximately 61% of Iowans are concerned about the increasing costs and are doubtful about the efforts made by lawmakers to tackle the issue. This sentiment reflects a growing belief that healthcare affordability is a pressing concern for the residents of Iowa across party lines.

data.title: DOJ opens criminal investigation of Federal Reserve Chair Powell in pressure to slash interest rates, escalating political battle.
data.description: The recent development of the Justice Department initiating a criminal investigation into Jerome H. Powell, the chair of the Federal Reserve, marks a significant escalation in efforts to push the central bank to reduce interest rates. This decision underscores the intensifying pressure on Powell and highlights the seriousness of the situation. The move comes amidst ongoing debates regarding interest rate adjustments and their impact on the economy. Powell's handling of monetary policy has been a topic of contention, with critics urging for more aggressive rate cuts to stimulate economic growth. The decision to investigate Powell reflects the growing concerns and disagreements surrounding the Federal Reserve's approach to interest rates. It signifies a crucial moment in the relationship between the government and the central bank, with potential implications for the wider financial landscape. This development has generated significant attention and speculation within political and economic circles, with stakeholders closely monitoring the situation for further updates.

data.title: American Skin Association welcomes Dr. Steven A. Rosenberg, a leading figure in cancer immunotherapy, to its Board of Directors.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, the American Skin Association (ASA) welcomed Dr. Steven A. Rosenberg, a leading expert in cancer immunotherapy, to its esteemed Board of Directors. His appointment brings added expertise to the board, which oversees vital initiatives in skin health and research.

data.title: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson lost $2.5 billion in 4 years due to government involvement in crypto, industry chaos.
data.description: Charles Hoskinson, the founder of Cardano (ADA) revealed a significant loss of over $2.5 billion in the last four years. He attributed the decline in the cryptocurrency market not to technological shortcomings but to government interference. The industry had anticipated a bull market following Trump's election, but instead, chaos ensued with most cryptocurrencies plummeting by 40-50% during his term. Hoskinson humorously likened the current state of crypto to Japan in 1946. Despite surviving events like the FTX collapse, Luna implosion, and Gary Gensler's SEC enforcement, the industry faced new challenges due to government interventions. Hoskinson criticized the creation of the Trump memecoin, labeling it as "catastrophic" and detrimental to bipartisan support. This commentary by Hoskinson sheds light on the adverse impact of government involvement on the cryptocurrency market's health and stability.

data.title: DOJ opens criminal probe of Federal Reserve chair Powell, escalating pressure to cut rates in political battle.
data.description: The announcement of a criminal investigation into Jerome H. Powell, the chair of the Federal Reserve, by the Justice Department marks a significant increase in pressure on the central bank to reduce interest rates. This development underscores the seriousness of the situation and the heightened scrutiny surrounding Powell's actions. The move is seen as a bold maneuver in the ongoing effort to push for interest rate cuts, with the potential to have far-reaching implications on the Federal Reserve's policies. This decision reflects a clear escalation in efforts to influence the central bank's decision-making process.
